community_pulse: The community is wrestling with practical meal optimization (ground beef vs. wagyu, fat intake limits) while simultaneously dealing with digestive healing and early-stage adaptation challenges. Meanwhile, food policy conversations are heating up around glyphosate and RFK Jr.'s influence on Trump's administration.

topics.title: Ground Beef vs. Wagyu: Why Your $8 Patty Might Beat the $40 One
topics.angle: Data-driven breakdown of the viral r/carnivore post showing sensory and satiation differences are minimal between premium and conventional ground beef—permission to save money without guilt.
topics.why_now: This post hit 8 upvotes but sparked genuine debate about ROI on expensive meat cuts. Community is questioning value propositions.

topics.title: The Fat Threshold Nobody Talks About: Why Dr. Baker's 'Unlimited Fat' Warning Matters
topics.angle: Unpack the 69-comment thread on Dr. Baker's recent stance that unlimited fat consumption can backfire—practical macros for energy vs. excess storage without shame.
topics.why_now: One of the highest-engagement posts this week (43 upvotes, 69 comments). People are confused about how much fat is actually optimal.

topics.title: SIBO, IBS-C, and Carnivore: What Actually Works When Everything Else Failed
topics.angle: Synthesize the multiple threads about digestive issues (SIBO/IBS-C, chronic gastritis, bloating) with real solutions—not just 'try carnivore,' but specific protocol adjustments for damaged guts.
topics.why_now: Three separate high-engagement posts about digestive healing this week. This is clearly a pain point for newcomers.

topics.title: Week 2 Weight Gain Is Normal—Here's Why Your Brain Feels Amazing While the Scale Doesn't
topics.angle: Address the psychological whiplash of the '2 weeks in, weight gain but mental freedom' post directly—reframe early-stage adaptation as non-linear and explain the neurotransmitter shift happening underneath.
topics.why_now: This exact post got 25 upvotes and 16 comments. Early adopters need reassurance that mental gains are real even if body comp lags.

topics.title: Glyphosate, Food Policy, and Your Meat Supply: What RFK Jr.'s Influence Actually Means for Carnivores
topics.angle: Cut through the political noise—explain what glyphosate residues on grain-fed beef actually are, why grass-fed advocates are excited, and whether the policy shift matters for your grocery bill and health.
topics.why_now: Dr. Baker's RFK/glyphosate video hit 100k+ views. Community is politically engaged but confused about implications for their diet.

topics.title: Histamine in Ground Meat: The White Oak Pastures Question and Fresh vs. Aged Beef
topics.angle: Deep dive into why some carnivores can't tolerate ground meat (histamine sensitivity) but thrive on whole cuts—brands, storage hacks, and whether freshness matters more than sourcing.
topics.why_now: Nine upvotes but 44 comments—high engagement on a specific practical problem. People are searching for solutions.

topics.title: Carnivore Pregnancy at 26 Weeks: Everything the Community Wants to Know (Interview-Style)
topics.angle: The viral pregnancy update post (266 upvotes, 81 comments) signals massive community interest—expand into a deeper Q&A format covering nutrition timing, energy needs, and birth outcomes.
topics.why_now: Highest-engagement post of the week. Shows carnivore community is aging into life stage questions beyond weight loss.

topics.title: Water Intake on Carnivore: Why It's Not Just a Footnote
topics.angle: The 11-upvote post on water intake identified an underrated variable—connect hydration directly to the energy crashes, sluggishness, and brain fog complaints flooding the threads this week.
topics.why_now: Multiple posts about low energy and brain fog. Water might be the unsexy missing link.

topics.title: Tallow Cracklings: The Underrated Carnivore Snack Everyone's Making
topics.angle: The 104-upvote beef fat cracklings post shows community excitement for rendered fat uses—turn this into a how-to with flavor variations, macro breakdown, and why it's better than packaged pork rinds.
topics.why_now: Second-highest engagement post after the pregnancy update. Community is experimenting with fat optimization.

topics.title: Dental Health Transformation on Carnivore: The Science Behind the 'Quick Cleaning' Effect
topics.angle: The 30-upvote dental cleaning post hints at something real—connect reduced inflammation, improved gum health, and plaque reduction to actual mechanistic changes from eliminating plant antigens.
topics.why_now: Often-overlooked benefit thread showing carnivore wins beyond weight/digestion. Good lifestyle content angle.
